title: Thirumal Perumai
subTitle: Three devotees from different walks of life face several trials that challenge their unwavering devotion to Lord Vishnu.

title: Engeyo Ketta Kural
subTitle: Ponni wants to live a lavish life but gets married to her cousin Kumaran. Her love for worldly pleasures makes her abandon Kumaran and her daughter for a richer man.

title: Kuttrapathirikai
subTitle: After the assassination of the prime minister, two police officials must work together with a special officer to uncover the organisation behind the crime.

title: Chinna
subTitle: Chinna, a gangster, changes his way of life after he falls in love with Gayatri. However, he ends up in jail after he kills a gang leader in order to save Gayatri.

title: Makkal Aatchi
subTitle: Sethupathi, a common man, gets lucky when he accidentally finds a large amount of money in a truck. He decides to use the money to enter politics and ends up becoming the chief minister of the state.

title: Alexander
subTitle: CBI officer Alexander investigates a complex case involving murder, smuggling and political corruption. However, his search leads him to a dangerous game of cat and mouse with powerful adversaries.

title: Vandhaan Vendraan
subTitle: On the request of the woman he loves, Arjun goes to great lengths to put his half-brother Ramana, who is a don, behind bars. However, his attempts put him in a dangerous situation.

title: Panchalankurichi
subTitle: Raised under Mayandi's roof, Kittan finds himself at odds with the family's rival, Kali. However, a budding romance threatens to complicate matters further.

title: Sirithu Vazha Vendum
subTitle: A young boy is the only survivor after his family faces a brutal attack. However, as he grows, the unfortunate night continues to haunt him, so he decides to look for his parents' killer.

title: Vandhaan Vendraan

title: Kuppathu Raja
subTitle: Rocket, a slum dweller, sees his life change when he joins forces with a gang leader MG Rajendran to put a stop to crime in their area.

title: Chanakya
subTitle: Arjun, a highly sought-after RAW agent, is known for his skills at catching some of the most hardened criminals. However, he falls in danger when he goes after Ibrahim Qureshi, a terrorist.

title: Iraivi
subTitle: An alcoholic filmmaker and his financially struggling friends turn to crime in hopes of improving their fortunes. However, their actions land them in prison, leaving their wives in trouble and forcing them to embrace independent lives.

title: Dhavani Kanavugal
subTitle: An older brother tries to get his five younger sisters married but fails due to their poverty. So, he goes to town for work when an incident completely changes his life.

title: Azhagana Naatkal
subTitle: Chandru agrees to marry the girl of his father's choice when his lover, Indu, goes missing. However, Chandru faces a tough predicament when Indu returns with a young girl and claims he is the father.

title: Thalaivan
subTitle: A dangerous robber kills a rich man and blames the wife. However, a police officer pursues the robber, who seeks the victim's secret treasure.

title: Singaravelan
subTitle: Velan's mother tells him to find his cousin, Sumathi, who lives in the city and marry her. Velan sets out to find her with the help of a childhood photograph.

title: Mudhal Mariyadhai
subTitle: A middle-aged upper-caste man, Malaichami, leads an unhappy married life but seeks comfort in a new friendship with a low-caste woman. However, their friendship leads to many rumours in their village.
